posts.title: Welcome to Our Blog1
posts.description:
# Welcome!

This is our first blog post. We're excited to share news and updates with you.

## Features

- Easy content management
- Real-time updates
- Markdown support

posts.title: Getting Started Guide
posts.description:
# Getting Started

Follow these steps to set up your blog:

1. Create a Google Sheet
2. Add your content
3. Configure the app
4. Deploy!

posts.title: New Features Released
posts.description:
# What's New

We've added some exciting features:

- Pinned posts - Highlight important content
- Categories - Organize posts
- Images - Visual appeal
